landmark_rooms.name: Heart of the Wood
landmark_rooms.description: Ancient willows crowd together here, their roots intertwined. Emberhome's lanterns glow faintly through the canopy behind you.

landmark_rooms.name: The Wayward Shrine
landmark_rooms.description: A moss-covered shrine carved into a hollow trunk. Someone has left fresh wildflowers.

landmark_rooms.name: The Whisper Hollow
landmark_rooms.description: The ground dips into a natural bowl. Voices carry strangely here — you hear fragments of conversation from nowhere.

landmark_rooms.name: Merchant's Crossing
landmark_rooms.description: A well-worn path crosses a shallow stream. Cart tracks mark the mud on both sides.

landmark_rooms.name: The Withering Thicket
landmark_rooms.description: The willows here are skeletal — bark peeling, branches bare. Something has drained the life from them.

landmark_rooms.name: Ashen Clearing
landmark_rooms.description: A circle of scorched earth where nothing grows. The stumps of burned willows ring the clearing like teeth.

landmark_rooms.name: The Still Pool
landmark_rooms.description: A dark pond fed by no visible stream. The water is perfectly still — not even leaves disturb the surface.

landmark_rooms.name: The Rootbridge
landmark_rooms.description: Living roots form a natural bridge over a deep ravine. The wood groans and shifts underfoot.

destination_gates.name: The Root Stair
destination_gates.description: Massive roots spiral downward into darkness. The air rising from below smells of damp earth and iron.

destination_gates.name: The Canopy Ladder
destination_gates.description: Woven rope ladders ascend through thinning branches toward the distant crown of the Burnwillow.

destination_gates.name: The Maw
destination_gates.description: A jagged crack in the hillside exhales a cold breath. Claw marks line the stone around the entrance.

destination_gates.name: The Heart's Threshold
destination_gates.description: The bottom of the Still Pool is not stone. It is heartwood — warm, dense, older than anything on the surface. A passage descends inward, through the grain itself.

destination_gates.name: The Root Descent
destination_gates.description: Beneath the Rootbridge, where the oldest roots intertwine, a gap opens into darkness. The air rising from below smells of wet earth and centuries of compost.

description_pool: The path narrows between leaning willows. Footprints in the mud suggest recent passage.
Fallen branches block the trail. Someone has been cutting them — recently.
A game trail winds through tall grass. Something rustles just out of sight.
A shallow stream cuts across the path. The water runs dark with tannin.
Stepping stones cross a bubbling brook. One stone has a carved rune on its face.
A ring of willows leans inward, branches touching like clasped hands.
The trees here grow in a spiral pattern. The air smells of sap and decay.
Stone foundations peek through moss. Someone lived here once.
A crumbled waypost lists directions to places you've never heard of.
Claw marks score the earth around a massive hollow log. Something lives here.
Bones and fur litter the ground. The den's occupant is elsewhere — for now.
A break in the canopy reveals the landscape below. You can see far from here.
The ridge offers a clear view. Smoke rises from Emberhome in the distance.

territorial_boar.name: Territorial Boar
territorial_boar.description: A massive boar blocks the trail, tusks lowered, eyes red.

social.description: Calm the beast with steady voice and posture.

exploration.description: Spot a side trail that avoids the boar entirely.

narrative.description: Observe quietly. The boar guards a shallow grave — someone buried here.

will_o_wisp.name: Will-o'-Wisp
will_o_wisp.description: A pale light drifts between the trees, always just ahead.

combat.description: Attack the light. It fights back.

social.description: Offer a prayer. The wisp brightens and waits.

exploration.description: Follow at a distance. It leads you somewhere unexpected.

narrative.description: Watch it fade. You notice it hovers where a name is carved into bark.

collapsed_bridge.name: Collapsed Bridge
collapsed_bridge.description: The old bridge has given way. The ravine is too wide to jump.

social.description: Call out. A voice answers from the other side.

exploration.description: Search downstream. Find a fallen tree spanning the gap.

narrative.description: The bridge was cut deliberately. Tool marks on the supports.

lost_fawn.name: Lost Fawn
lost_fawn.description: A young deer stands trembling in the underbrush, leg caught in old wire.

social.description: Approach slowly and free the trapped leg.

exploration.description: Follow the wire. Find a network of old traps — and who set them.

narrative.description: The wire is dwarven make, corroded green. This trap is very old.

blighted_wolf.name: Blighted Wolf
blighted_wolf.description: A wolf with fungal growths along its spine watches you from the undergrowth. Its eyes glow faintly.

combat.description: Put the creature out of its misery.

social.description: Show no fear. The wolf is more sick than savage.

exploration.description: Follow the spore trail back to its source.

narrative.description: The blight is spreading. This wolf wandered too close to the Grove's edge.

spore_shambler.name: Spore Shambler
spore_shambler.description: A figure made of moss and rotting wood shambles between the trees, leaving a trail of mushrooms.

combat.description: Destroy the shambler before it spreads.

social.description: The creature was once alive. Speak to it gently.

exploration.description: Avoid the shambler and harvest the mushrooms it left behind.

narrative.description: The shambler was once a willow tender. Their tools hang from its bark.

rot_sprite.name: Rot Sprite
rot_sprite.description: A tiny winged creature buzzes around your head, giggling. Wherever it lands, the wood blackens.

combat.description: Swat it out of the air.

social.description: Offer it something shiny. Rot sprites love trinkets.

exploration.description: Follow it. Rot sprites nest near hidden things.

narrative.description: Rot sprites are drawn to dying willows. This one is circling a specific tree.

reward_item.name: Willow Seed
reward_item.description: Plant in any dungeon room to create a 1-turn safe rest point.

economics.positive_suffix: A caravan has set up camp here. Lanterns swing from posts.
economics.negative_suffix: The crossing is empty. Rotting crates line the bank.

security.positive_suffix: A patrol camp has been established. Soldiers tend a cookfire.
security.negative_suffix: Squatters huddle around a dying fire. They watch you with hollow eyes.

religion.positive_suffix: The shrine gleams. Fresh flowers and candles crowd the alcove.
religion.negative_suffix: The shrine has been defaced. Strange symbols are scratched into the bark.

social.positive_suffix: The whispers are warm — laughter, singing, fragments of celebration.
social.negative_suffix: The whispers are sharp — accusations, weeping, the sound of doors slamming.

geography.positive_suffix: New growth pushes through the dead bark. Green shoots, fragile but alive.
geography.negative_suffix: The withering has spread further since your last visit. Even the ground is grey.
